predictions.forecast_value: full economic restart (return to pre-Covid GDP level)
predictions.source_quote: Encouraging news on the vaccine front strengthens our base case of a full restart by late 2021.
But even the moderately higher inflation in our base case – around 2.5-3% annually – would surprise markets after a decade of undershoots.

predictions.forecast_value: rangebound (central banks limit rises despite rising inflation expectations)
predictions.source_quote: We see nominal bond yields as staying relatively rangebound, further diminishing the role of government bonds as portfolio ballast.
